title: Develop an arboricultural impact assessment report
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop an arboricultural impact assessment report demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Undertake assessment of trees affecting site

pcs.text: Identify and research impact of legislation and Australian Standards of trees on site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and research impact of legislation and Australian Standards of trees on site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and research impact of legislation and Australian Standards of trees on site.

pcs.text: Determine requirements of statutory authorities for trees on development site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine requirements of statutory authorities for trees on development site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine requirements of statutory authorities for trees on development site.

pcs.text: Determine local government planning laws, tree protection and preservation regulations for site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine local government planning laws, tree protection and preservation regulations for site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine local government planning laws, tree protection and preservation regulations for site.

pcs.text: Assess or survey trees on adjacent site and determine legal status and suitability for retention
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess or survey trees on adjacent site and determine legal status and suitability for retention?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess or survey trees on adjacent site and determine legal status and suitability for retention.

pcs.text: Conduct a site assessment and identify conditions that impact tree protection program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct a site assessment and identify conditions that impact tree protection program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct a site assessment and identify conditions that impact tree protection program.

pcs.text: Identify hazards, activities and circumstances that have potential to harm trees and assess the level of risk
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards, activities and circumstances that have potential to harm trees and assess the level of risk?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards, activities and circumstances that have potential to harm trees and assess the level of risk.

pcs.text: Locate and confirm trees plotted on survey plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate and confirm trees plotted on survey plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate and confirm trees plotted on survey plan.

pcs.text: Plot trees not represented onto survey plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plot trees not represented onto survey plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plot trees not represented onto survey plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Undertake assessment of trees affecting site

elements.title: Compile preliminary tree assessment data

pcs.text: Collect available relevant plans and documentation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect available relevant plans and documentation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect available relevant plans and documentation.

pcs.text: Identify and record affected trees with botanical and common name on development and adjoining site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record affected trees with botanical and common name on development and adjoining site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record affected trees with botanical and common name on development and adjoining site.

pcs.text: Record tree dimensions according to statutory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record tree dimensions according to statutory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record tree dimensions according to statutory requirements.

pcs.text: Determine age class and estimate life expectancy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine age class and estimate life expectancy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine age class and estimate life expectancy.

pcs.text: Determine tree health in relation to tree physiology and pathology
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine tree health in relation to tree physiology and pathology?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine tree health in relation to tree physiology and pathology.

pcs.text: Determine condition of tree structure in relation to tree anatomy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine condition of tree structure in relation to tree anatomy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine condition of tree structure in relation to tree anatomy.

pcs.text: Assess heritage and cultural value of trees
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess heritage and cultural value of trees?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess heritage and cultural value of trees.

pcs.text: Assess habitat, ecology and environmental impact of trees on site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess habitat, ecology and environmental impact of trees on site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess habitat, ecology and environmental impact of trees on site.

pcs.text: Assess impact of location to existing and past site structures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess impact of location to existing and past site structures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess impact of location to existing and past site structures.

pcs.text: Determine the retention value
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the retention value?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the retention value.

pcs.text: Compile all tree assessment data required for report
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compile all tree assessment data required for report?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compile all tree assessment data required for report.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Compile preliminary tree assessment data

elements.title: Document preliminary arboricultural report

pcs.text: Record all trees and groups of trees suitable for retention
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record all trees and groups of trees suitable for retention?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record all trees and groups of trees suitable for retention.

pcs.text: Determine indicative tree protection zone (TPZ) and structural root zone (SRZ) for each tree
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine indicative tree protection zone (TPZ) and structural root zone (SRZ) for each tree?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine indicative tree protection zone (TPZ) and structural root zone (SRZ) for each tree.

pcs.text: Plot tree identifiers and indicative TPZ on survey plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plot tree identifiers and indicative TPZ on survey plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plot tree identifiers and indicative TPZ on survey plan.

pcs.text: Document preliminary arboricultural report
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document preliminary arboricultural report?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document preliminary arboricultural report.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Document preliminary arboricultural report

elements.title: Assess impact of proposed development on trees

pcs.text: Interpret existing plans, working drawings, terms and symbols
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret existing plans, working drawings, terms and symbols?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret existing plans, working drawings, terms and symbols.

pcs.text: Interpret development and design language
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret development and design language?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret development and design language.

pcs.text: Assess potential mechanical and chemical impact of development on trees and determine controls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess potential mechanical and chemical impact of development on trees and determine controls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess potential mechanical and chemical impact of development on trees and determine controls.

pcs.text: Determine impact of proposed development on trees
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine impact of proposed development on trees?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine impact of proposed development on trees.

pcs.text: Provide preliminary feedback to client on potential areas of improvement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide preliminary feedback to client on potential areas of improvement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide preliminary feedback to client on potential areas of improvement.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Assess impact of proposed development on trees

elements.title: Contribute to design development

pcs.text: Liaise with client on design of development to minimise impact on trees
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Liaise with client on design of development to minimise impact on trees?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Liaise with client on design of development to minimise impact on trees.

pcs.text: Assess constructability of design to ensure impacts on trees are minimised
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess constructability of design to ensure impacts on trees are minimised?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess constructability of design to ensure impacts on trees are minimised.

pcs.text: Liaise with design team to develop tree sensitive design and construction methods
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Liaise with design team to develop tree sensitive design and construction methods?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Liaise with design team to develop tree sensitive design and construction methods.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Contribute to design development

elements.title: Determine indicative and actual TPZ

pcs.text: Assess development requirements for site access and logistics
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess development requirements for site access and logistics?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess development requirements for site access and logistics.

pcs.text: Review indicative TPZ
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review indicative TPZ?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review indicative TPZ.

pcs.text: Determine extent of encroachment into indicative TPZ
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine extent of encroachment into indicative TPZ?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine extent of encroachment into indicative TPZ.

pcs.text: Determine impact of works on SRZ
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine impact of works on SRZ?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine impact of works on SRZ.

pcs.text: Determine extent of actual SRZ
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine extent of actual SRZ?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine extent of actual SRZ.

pcs.text: Determine actual TPZ for trees to be retained
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine actual TPZ for trees to be retained?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine actual TPZ for trees to be retained.

pcs.text: Define and record the actual TPZ
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define and record the actual TPZ?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define and record the actual TPZ.

elements.title: Establish site conditions to retain tree viability to major encroachment

pcs.text: Determine level of encroachment into TPZ following design development
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine level of encroachment into TPZ following design development?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine level of encroachment into TPZ following design development.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess impact of major encroachment on tree?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess impact of major encroachment on tree.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider implications of major encroachment on health, physiology and structural integrity of tree.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess impact on soil characteristics and volume of past, existing and future structures on tree.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider site conditions and design factors to minimise impact of encroachment on tree.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish site conditions and design factors required to retain viability of tree.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine additional remedial measures to protect tree viability.
